content.shortDescription: Easily and quickly create and apply themes. By extracting colors from the background image, it automatically creates a theme to suit the user’s style.
content.title: Create a theme using the background image.
content.description:
<Create full themes>
- Create a theme by using the automatically recommended colors based on your wallpaper, or by selecting the colors you want
- Change the colors by app to suit your taste
- When creating a general mode theme, create a dark mode theme separately

<Create independent themes by function>
- Samsung Keyboard: Change the keyboard background and the color, style, and image of each key for decoration)
- Quick settings window: Customize the notification panel, quick settings button, and brightness bar
- Volume control window: Customize the volume panel
- Icon pack: Customize the shape, color, image of icons
- Possible to exclude application of themes by app

content.shortDescription: Provides richer effects of Edge Lighting.
This is the Task Changer with faster actions and new styles.
Apply various styles to the S Pen. You can change the Air command style and the shape of the S Pen pointer.
content.title: Customize the S Pen
content.description:
- Change the Air command style and the shape of the S Pen pointer 
- Change the S Pen sound when pulling it out
- Double tap the screen with the Pen to start an app shortcut

content.shortDescription: Create 3D motion wallpapers with various effects. You can add a motion effect on your favorite images and decorate your wallpaper with stickers, videos, and text, as well as add particle effects.
content.title: Create moving wallpapers
content.description:
- Add motion effects to background images
- Create gradient backgrounds
- Add particle effects
- Add 3D effects to portrait mode photo wallpapers

content.shortDescription: Create new Lock screens and Always On Display styles. You can arrange each component such as the Clock, Notifications, Shortcut apps, etc. to your chosen locations, and customize the Lock screen wallpaper with various stickers.
content.title: Customize the Lock screen and AOD screen.
content.description:
<Lock screen>
- Select various clock designs and sizes
- Relocate the Lock screen component
- Choose Notification type, icon color and size
- Adjust the Lock screen timeout
- Decorate with stickers

<AOD>
- Suggest various clock styles
- Choose to show or hide each component

content.shortDescription: Set the keyboard optimized for you and try creating your own unique animated stickers.
content.title: Create your own keyboard.
content.description:
- Customize your keyboard (add, delete, rearrange)
- Adjust the key size to be wider or narrower
- Apply a new style to your keyboard (colors, key effects and touch sound)
- Create sticker sets with your favorite images

content.shortDescription: Conveniently organize the navigation bar and gesture mode.
content.title: Create your own navigation bar or gesture mode.
content.description:
<Navigation bar>
- Customize the navigation bar icons with stickers
- Added Useful features button
- Change the background color of the navigation bar
- Provides a navigation bar hiding feature

<Gesture mode>
- Hide the background of gesture handles
- Adjust the length and color of gesture handles
- Provides quick app switching in the navigation bar of the “Galaxy Fold” through the “Show recently activated apps” feature

content.shortDescription: Enjoy the improved One UI Home experience.
content.title: Enjoy the One UI Home more easily.
content.description:
- Change arrangement of home screen, Apps screen, and folders
- Rotate through pages on the Apps screen 
- Supports folder name suggestions
- Supports the folder pop-up form and adjusts the app arrangement ratio (a pop-up folder is provided by default for tablets starting from the One Ui4)
- Backup/restore home screen layout 
- Neatly manage sharing windows
- Display the recent apps screen in various layouts
- Check the list of apps by scrolling vertically on the Apps screen

content.shortDescription: You can configure many different clock styles on the lock screen and AOD.
content.title: Choose the clock style you want.
content.description:
- Create various clock styles
 : Select the type of clock you want and decorate it with text, images, or GIFs
- AOD clock decoration
- Apply clock screen for Watch to device (One UI 4.1 or higher)

content.shortDescription: Redesign your own Quick panel UI. You can make the status bar simple with hidden icons and change the theme of the Quick panel.
content.title: Customize the status bar and Quick panel.
content.description:
- Hide icons on the status bar 
- Change Quick panel theme
- Sort by time of incoming notifications 
- Add button grid options in Quick panel (wider or narrower)
- Open the Quick panel by separating into left and right

content.shortDescription: Add your own personal touch to your notifications. Enjoy fun effects when receiving notifications.
content.title: Enjoy your very own personalized notifications.
content.description:
- Customize the edge lighting style displayed on the screen when receiving notifications
- Set styles by keyword
- Provides expressions of emotions for notifications using emoji/text stickers
- Used only when the screen is off
- Change images to app icons
- Change app launch methods from notification pop-ups
 : Double-tap to launch apps, prevents swiping down
